name: Paralytic Poison
description: Numbing agent that paralyzes struck enemies.

name: Lockpick Set
description: Delicate tools for opening locked containers.

name: Climbing Rope
description: Sturdy rope for scaling walls and cliffs.

name: Everburn Torch
description: Magical torch that burns without fuel.

name: Dungeon Map
description: Automatically charts the surrounding dungeon.

name: Travel Ration
description: Dried meat and hardtack for long journeys.

name: Heroes Feast
description: A lavish meal that temporarily boosts all attributes.

name: Iron Caltrops
description: Spiked balls that slow pursuing enemies.

name: Bear Trap
description: Heavy trap that immobilizes large creatures.

name: Resurrection Crystal
description: Rare crystal that revives an entire fallen party.

name: Teleport Crystal
description: Shatters to return the party to safety instantly.

name: Tome of Knowledge
description: Ancient text that grants permanent skill knowledge.

name: Charm of Fortune
description: Increases item drop rates for the next encounter.

name: Tiny Fangs
description: Tiny creature fangs. A weak venomous bite.

name: Small Fangs
description: Small creature fangs. A venomous bite.

name: Goblin Dagger
description: A crude iron blade.

name: Goblin Shortbow
description: A crude bow.

name: Goblin Cleaver
description: A crude bow.

name: Minor Health Potion
description: Restores a small amount of health.

name: Health Potion
description: Restores a moderate amount of health.

name: Minor Mana Potion
description: Restores a small amount of mana.

name: Mana Potion
description: Restores a moderate amount of mana.

name: Minor Stamina Potion
description: Restores a small amount of stamina.

name: Escape Rope
description: Guarantees a successful retreat from combat.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Guarantees a successful retreat and obscures enemy vision.

name: Throwing Knife
description: A quick ranged attack dealing moderate damage.

name: Large Fangs
description: Large creature fangs. Strong venom, deals poison damage on every hit.

name: Great Fangs
description: Massive creature fangs. Deadly venom, tears and poisons on every hit.

name: Shaman Totem
description: A crude shamanic focus carved from bone.
